hero.badgeText: for your first thumbnail for free
hero.description: Stop wasting hours creating thumbnails manually. Get high-quality thumbnails in seconds with our advanced AI.

features.sectionSubtitle: Create stunning thumbnails that get clicks, without the hassle
features.aiCaption: Our AI understands what makes a video go viral and designs thumbnails accordingly.
features.showcaseTitle: boost your views with AI-optimized designs
features.showcaseDesc: Stop guessing and start ranking. Our AI creates designs proven to capture attention
features.item1Desc: Our AI analyzes video content to suggest the most clickable concepts.
features.item2Desc: Generate vibrant, high-contrast thumbnails that stand out in the feed
features.item3Desc: Get fully layered designs you can tweak to perfection if needed

cta.title: Ready to go viral?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of creators using AI to boost their CTR.

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: See how AI thumbnails are helping channels explode their views

about.title: Hi, I'm
about.desc1: Full-stack developer focused on enhancing projects. I built Copilot4YT to help YouTubers generate stunning thumbnails with AI, because every creator deserves professional-looking content.
about.desc2: Making every customer feel valued—no matter the size of your audience. I believe in building products that are accessible, powerful, and delightful to use.
about.portfolioDesc: Personal portfolio showcasing projects and skills
about.connectDesc: Interested in collaborating or just want to say hi? Feel free to reach out through any of these platforms.

contact.title: Get In
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Want to collaborate? Or just want to say hi? I'd love to hear from you. Choose your preferred way to connect.
contact.portfolioDesc: Check out my work and projects
contact.locationDesc: Open to remote opportunities and collaborations

footer.tagline: Making every customer feel valued—no matter the size of your audience.

privacyModal.title: Privacy Notice
privacyModal.message1: Please ensure that the uploaded image does not violate the privacy or rights of third parties.
privacyModal.message2: Avoid using photographs containing faces or personal data of individuals without their explicit consent.
